---
title: "BBRSpec"
generated: true
description: "Static configuration for [`bbr_register`](../nitrix-register/bbr_register.qmd)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._bbr`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:BBRSpec -->
```python
class BBRSpec
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:BBRSpec -->
Static configuration for [`bbr_register`](../nitrix-register/bbr_register.qmd).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:BBRSpec.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(step: float = 1.0, slope: float = 0.5, q0: float = 0.0, iterations: int = 50, schedule: Optional[tuple[float, ...]] = (4.0, 2.0, 1.0), search: Optional[BBRSearch] = BBRSearch(), mode: ConvergenceMode = 'fixed', convergence: Convergence = Convergence(), rotation_step: float = 0.03, translation_step: float = 2.0, step_decay: float = 0.92, interpolation: Interpolator = Linear(), boundary_mode: BoundaryMode = 'nearest', cval: float = 0.0, eps: float = 0.001) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
